text: Bilkul, mere paas thakne ka waqt nahi hai, isliye bas chalte rehna pad raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D months loop.
text: Kai hafton se tum isi pipeline chase mein bina recovery window ke daud rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thakan itni hai ki neend light hai, kirana udhaar aur remittance dono dimaag mein loud rehte hain, par rukna allowed nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Do restatements ke baad thin replies par ek sawaal.
text: Jab tum bolte ho bas endurance hi reality hai, abhi sabse zyada kis hisse ka darr loud hai - kirana udhaar ya remittance slip?

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: mere paas thakne ka waqt nahi hai
text: Dono loud hain, par remittance slip ka darr zyada chipka hai; isliye mere paas thakne ka waqt nahi hai aur bachay ki muskurahat pe dhyaan kam pad jaata hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C4 + Duty_Based: exhaustion under fatigue frame.
text: Lagta hai fatigue ke neeche tum pure exhaust ho chuke ho, aur phir bhi khud ko result-mode mein jakaye hue ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, fatigue aur duty ek doosre ko feed kar rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Metro migrant + kirana debt reality validate.
text: Contract loss ke baad metro mein akele rehkar pipeline banana emotionally bahut kharch ho jata hai. Tumhari thakan proof hai load zyada hai, proof nahi ki tum bhag rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Samajh aa raha hai, par ab bhi chest heavy rehta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Udhaar + remittance silence normalize.
text: Kirana udhaar + remittance wale combo par log aksar chup rehte hain, sirf tumhara nahi, lekin bolte nahi kyunki sabko lagta hai baat ki toh izzat slip ho jayegi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo pipeline bhi chale aur main tootun na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Client loss + dual cashflow squeeze structural reframe.
text: Client contract loss freelancer ya chhote business par cashflow aur isolation dono ek saath hit karta hai. Yeh structural crunch hai, personal fail ka stamp nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Teen chhote steps doable lag rahe hain, leads ping aur update draft.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Micro steps <10 min: outreach + message + kid moment.
text: Teen chhote steps: (1) 6 minute mein 2 realistic leads ko short template se ping karo. (2) 4 line ka gaon/kirana update likho, numbers simple. (3) bachay ke saath 7 minute walk, phone silent.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sticky aur opening lines clear hain, thoda control feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek outreach + update draft flow.
text: Pehle 2 leads ke naam sticky pe likho aur har ek ka sirf ek opening line draft karo. Phir update ka first paragraph likho. Bas itna aaj.

speaker: Seeker
text: Partial sach wala angle samajh aa gaya, thoda darr spread ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Logistics + feelings balance affirm.
text: Pipeline ko chhota map dena smart hai, isse tum endurance ko kam nahi, control zyada kar rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Calendar slot daal dunga, kal morning structured lagega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Second reframe: partial truth se expectation manage.
text: Partial sach bolne se remittance expectation realistic hoti hai, aur tumhare andar wala darr thoda spread ho kar kam tight hota hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Shut-down micro-pack simple lag raha hai, achcha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Evening wrap distinct opener.
text: Shut-down micro-pack: paani, sticky photo, kal subah 10-minute lead-call slot calendar mein daal do.

speaker: Seeker
text: Endurance poori nahi hata sakta, par map ke saath chal sakta hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Paced duty without dupe opener.
text: Provider-mode mein bhi tum balance dhundh rahe ho, bas ab zimmedari ko thoda zyada paced tarike se carry karna seekh rahe ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Neend agar 3-4 din bigad jaaye tab doctor sochunga, pehle breathing micro.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Optional sleep micro if wired.
text: Neend agar wired ho to 5 minute slow breathing + room thanda try karna, phone charging se door.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thanks, aaj thoda roadmap mil gaya.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Kid moment + work split affirm.
text: Bachay ke saath 7 minute bhi tumhari fatigue ko punish nahi karta, trust rebuild karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal ke liye thoda ready feel ho raha hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final close: map + endurance.
text: Kal tum sirf endurance nahi, chhota map ke saath pipeline bhi chalaoge. Wahi shift fatigue ko halka karega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakna ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta
text: Thakna ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta, business loss ke baad bachay ki zimmedari aur metro city ke kharche mujhe rukne nahi dete.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B: luxury-of-rest impossible + provider lock.
text: Thakna luxury jo afford nahi kar sakte wala frame tumhe metro expenses aur bachay ki zimmedari ke beech jakad ke rakhta hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakna ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta
text: Papa ne gaon mein khet girvi rakh kar mujhe padhaya tha, isliye main thakan mein bhi extra hours laga raha hoon taaki unka bharosa na toote.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D: post-loss grind without recovery window.
text: Metro burn ke saath tum kaafi hafton se extra hours se hi continuity dhundh rahe ho, jaise pause hi gunaah ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main bas ek structural loop mein fasa hoon, himmat jawab de gayi hai par rukna nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens E: khet girvi + bharosa slip fear.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: thakna ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta
text: Yeh sab bolun to lagta hai main kamzor lagoonga, kyunki thakna ek luxury hai jo main afford nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Supporter

text: Papa ka bharosa tumhare kandhe pe chipka hua hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, bas chipka loop feel ho raha hai, muh se nikal nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter

text: Extra hours laga ke bhi tum khud ko rukne ki gunnah samajh rahe ho, jaise rukna khandaan ka qarz badha dega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Andar se numb si feeling hai, par chalna pad raha hai.

speaker: Supporter

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
